title: Perform basic ecological restoration works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform basic ecological restoration works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify activities and inspect site for required works

pcs.text: Locate work site from plans, and interpret goals for project from supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate work site from plans, and interpret goals for project from supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate work site from plans, and interpret goals for project from supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Locate elements within site that are intact and require protecting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate elements within site that are intact and require protecting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate elements within site that are intact and require protecting.

pcs.text: Identify areas on site that have potential for natural or assisted regeneration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify areas on site that have potential for natural or assisted regeneration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify areas on site that have potential for natural or assisted regeneration.

pcs.text: Identify or confirm areas requiring reintroduction of biota
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify or confirm areas requiring reintroduction of biota?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify or confirm areas requiring reintroduction of biota.

pcs.text: Identify treatments for specific locations on site according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify treatments for specific locations on site according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify treatments for specific locations on site according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Confirm site works to be performed with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site works to be performed with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site works to be performed with supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify activities and inspect site for required works

elements.title: Prepare for basic ecological restoration work

pcs.text: Identify site-specific environmental and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site-specific environmental and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site-specific environmental and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and transport tools, equipment and machinery for site works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and transport tools, equipment and machinery for site works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and transport tools, equipment and machinery for site works.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Identify and implement biosecurity control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement biosecurity control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement biosecurity control measures.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Prepare tools and materials for ecological restoration treatments and transport to site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare tools and materials for ecological restoration treatments and transport to site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare tools and materials for ecological restoration treatments and transport to site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for basic ecological restoration work

elements.title: Implement basic ecological restoration treatments

pcs.text: Apply substrate and hydrological treatments according to instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply substrate and hydrological treatments according to instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply substrate and hydrological treatments according to instructions.

pcs.text: Apply control treatments to competing undesirable biota
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply control treatments to competing undesirable biota?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply control treatments to competing undesirable biota.

pcs.text: Install basic habitat elements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install basic habitat elements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install basic habitat elements.

pcs.text: Reintroduce desirable biota to assist with ecological restoration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reintroduce desirable biota to assist with ecological restoration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reintroduce desirable biota to assist with ecological restoration.

pcs.text: Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures during works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures during works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures during works.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement basic ecological restoration treatments

elements.title: Complete basic ecological restoration works

pcs.text: Install and maintain security, support or protection devices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install and maintain security, support or protection devices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install and maintain security, support or protection devices.

pcs.text: Undertake follow-up of control of competing species or adjust substrate, hydrology or habitat elements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake follow-up of control of competing species or adjust substrate, hydrology or habitat elements.

pcs.text: Clear and dispose of site waste according to environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear and dispose of site waste according to environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear and dispose of site waste according to environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete basic ecological restoration works
